message:
fix(google-admin-reports): correct swapped capability IDs in related fields

The `related` fields for list_activities and list_user_usage were
swapped — the audit operation referenced the usage capability and
vice versa:

- list_activities: admin.reports.usage.read → admin.reports.audit.read
- list_user_usage: admin.reports.audit.read → admin.reports.usage.read

The other two operations (list_customer_usage, list_entity_usage) were
already correct with admin.reports.usage.read.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
